name: Cleaning Time
title: Cleaning Time
desc: "Cleanup sequence in progress... Based on data from past incidents, please avoid dropping small items such as: Mora, screws, gears, minerals, toys, gummies, snacks, hairbands, socks, and slippers."

skills.desc: For each type of effect status applied to your Hand, create 1 random basic Elemental Die. (Max 2)
